title: Shopkeeper Personalities
entries: I greet absolutely everyone with a warm hug.
I have a much better head for numbers than people.
I'm often more willing to barter in favors than coin.
I don't trust adventurers, not even a little bit.
It's all business with me, no need to be personable.
Repeat customers are my best friends.
I'll haggle all day, until your ears fall off.
I'm convinced my natural showmanship is what earns me customers.
